title: Inflation Remains A Problem
text: U.S. equity markets posted their worst week of the year as benchmark interest rates jumped to three-month highs on data showing a surprising reacceleration in inflation and economic activity in January. Declining for a third straight week - a skid that follows a stretch of four-of-five weekly gains to start the year - the S&P 500 dipped 2.7% while the Nasdaq declined over 3%.

title: Extra Space Storage Inc. (EXR) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE:EXR ) Q4 2022 Results Conference Call February 23, 2023 1:00 PM ET Company Participants Jeff Norman - VP of IR and Corporate Communications Joe Margolis - Chief Executive Officer Scott Stubbs - CFO Conference Call Participants Michael Goldsmith - UBS Jeffrey Spector - BofA Securities Todd Thomas - KeyBanc Capital Markets Keegan Carl - Wolfe Research Smedes Rose - Citi Spenser Allaway - Green Street Ronald Kamdem - Morgan Stanley Juan Sanabria - BMO Capital Markets Steve Sakwa - Evercore ISI Ki Bin Kim - Truist Operator Good day, and thank you for all for standing by. Welcome to the Q4 2022 Extra Space Storage, Inc. Earnings Conference Call.

title: Extra Space (EXR) Tops Q4 FFO, Guides '23 Below Expectation
text: Extra Space's (EXR) Q4 results benefit from higher average rates for existing customers and a rise in other operating income. However, it provides a lower-than-expected 2023 projection.

title: Extra Space Storage (EXR) Tops Q4 FFO and Revenue Estimates
text: Extra Space Storage (EXR) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 0.48% and 2.28%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Dividend Increases Are Flying In This Month!
text: The dividend increases continue to roll in during February. A ton of companies have announced dividend increases. Dividend increases are a critical part of our dividend growth investing strategy. We focus on buying dividend stocks to build a growing passive income stream.

title: Why Earnings Season Could Be Great for Extra Space Storage (EXR)
text: Extra Space Storage (EXR) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: Walmart, Home Depot Among 15 Companies To Announce Dividend Increases In Second Half Of February
text: When it comes to annual dividend increases, February is the highlight of the year. There were at least 27 dividend boosts that were announced from a wide variety of companies. Widely held companies 3M, PepsiCo, and Coca-Cola all boosted their dividends in the first half of the month, with Pepsi announcing a 10% increase.

title: Risks Of 'No Landing'
text: U.S. equity markets were mixed on a choppy week as investors readjusted expectations for inflation and interest rates following data indicating an uptick in economic activity and persisting price pressures. Posting its first back-to-back weekly declines of the year, the S&P 500 slipped 0.2% this week, but other major benchmarks fared better. The Mid-Cap 400 and Small-Cap 600 both gained.

title: 9 February Inflation-Busting Ideal Dividend Dogs
text: March-April, 2022, UBS, Kiplinger, and Barron's analysts and reporters combined to list five sets of stocks sorted as: “Inflation Busters.” Those five articles revealed 48 equities, with 43 paying-dividends.

title: What's in Store for Extra Space Storage (EXR) in Q4 Earnings?
text: Extra Space Storage's (EXR) Q4 results are likely to reflect gains from high brand value and its solid presence in key cities.

title: 5 Stocks In The Dividend Growth Sweet Spot
text: Finding companies with a high initial yield and rapid dividend growth is difficult. I present my criteria for finding such companies. At present, there are 16 companies meeting my initial screening requirements. Using additional metrics, these are reduced to five.

title: Like Winners? These 3 Dividend Machines Regularly Beat the Dow
text: Steadily growing dividends have helped these stocks deliver Dow-crushing total returns.

title: The 9 Best Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy
text: Adding dividend growth stocks to your portfolio can provide both income and capital appreciation over the long haul. That makes these picks worth a closer look.

title: Sell Alert: 2 REITs Getting Risky
text: Most REITs are heavily discounted. But not all REITs are worth buying.
